description: Configure Wazuh's File Integrity Monitoring (FIM) to detect web shell uploads by monitoring /var/www/html in real-time with report_changes="yes" enabled. Implement a custom rule (ID 100050, Level 12) in local_rules.xml that triggers when a .php file is added to that directory, configured as a child of rule ID 554. Verify the configuration by creating a file named backdoor.php in /var/www/html and ensuring the alert triggers.
